title: Better Netherite Tools
description: New and improved textures for the netherite sword, axe, and pickaxe.
body:
A brand new texture pack made to improve on many of the netherite tools Minecraft has.  This texture pack changes textures for netherite tools and improves on it to give a more dangerous vibe. Some new textures include sword, axe, and pickaxe. More textures are to be released in newer versions of the pack! ![New Texture For The Sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6e5a14b673e5af13d281a8c55a4d7a009cf067b.png)
![Old Texture VS New Texture](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/24f18c3c1d812e96444b1a80ddd1eae8f7725eec.png)
